html:
Exclusive to:

“This needs some fertilizing after planting.”

-Banana Bushes (Item)

Banana Bushes are Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found growing on Moon Quay and are dropped in their item form from the Unnatural Portal.

A Banana Bush will grow 1 Banana after 3 growing stages at a rate of 1 stage per day regardless of daylight. Similar to Berry Bushes, it can be replanted when dug up with a Shovel but will need to be fertilized before it will start growing new fruit. The bush will need to be re-fertilized after 5-7 harvests.

Bugs

  • Despite having the MakeNoGrowInWinter() component, Banana Bushes will continue to grow during Winter.

Assets

  • Medium
  • Small
  • Empty
  • Dead

Gallery

  • Unused Banana Bush Burnt
  • Concept art of the Banana Bush shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

“That bush is bananas!”
–Wilson
“Bananas growing outside the caves? Weird.”
–Willow
“It makes delicious fruit for Wolfgang.”
–Wolfgang
“Bananas that grow in the sun... how unnatural.”
–Wendy
“THIS WORLD ALREADY HAS BANANAS INSTALLED. YOU ARE REDUNDANT”
–WX-78
“The fruit is remarkably similar to the subterranean strain.”
–Wickerbottom
“It's missing the tree part!”
–Woodie
“Bananas that don't grow in caves? Preposterous.”
–Maxwell
“I hath no use for a plant burgeoning with foul non-meats.”
–Wigfrid
“We didn't know bananas could grow outside!”
–Webber
“Ah, I've stumbled on some fresh bananas!”
–Warly
“New friend!”
–Wormwood
“Sure beats goin' down to the caves.”
–Winona
“Hyuyu, little shrub, are you waving at me?”
–Wortox
“Monkeys mean, but know good fruit.”
–Wurt
“Wait, I thought bananas grew on trees around here?”
–Walter
“They're much easier to pick this way.”
–Wanda
“This needs some fertilizing after planting.”
-Banana Bushes (Item)
Banana Bushes are Plants exclusive to Don't Starve Together, introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. They can be found growing on Moon Quay and are dropped in their item form from the Unnatural Portal.
A Banana Bush will grow 1 Banana after 3 growing stages at a rate of 1 stage per day regardless of daylight. Similar to Berry Bushes, it can be replanted when dug up with a Shovel but will need to be fertilized before it will start growing new fruit. The bush will need to be re-fertilized after 5-7 harvests.
Bugs[edit | edit source]
Despite having the MakeNoGrowInWinter() component, Banana Bushes will continue to grow during Winter.

summaryViHtml:
Tóm tắt

Bụi Chuối là Thực vật độc quyền trong Don't Starve Together, được giới thiệu trong bản cập nhật The Curse of Moon Quay. Chúng có thể được tìm thấy mọc ở Moon Quay và rơi ra ở dạng vật phẩm từ Cổng phi tự nhiên.
